video_info.title: European Qualifiers For 2026 FIFA World Cup
video_info.shortDescription: Türkiye and Romania are set to face off in a high‑stakes 2026 FIFA World Cup Qualifiers Play‑Off semifinal, a clash loaded with pressure, history, and contrasting momentum. Both sides are fighting for survival on the road to the World Cup. This semifinal promises intensity, drama, and high‑stakes football as Türkiye look to capitalize on home advantage while Romania search for another upset on the road. Find out who comes on top as we bring you all the action from the European Qualifiers for 2026 FIFA World Cup, LIVE on Sony LIV.
video_info.longDescription: Türkiye and Romania are set to face off in a high‑stakes 2026 FIFA World Cup Qualifiers Play‑Off semifinal, a clash loaded with pressure, history, and contrasting momentum. Both sides are fighting for survival on the road to the World Cup. This semifinal promises intensity, drama, and high‑stakes football as Türkiye look to capitalize on home advantage while Romania search for another upset on the road. Find out who comes on top as we bring you all the action from the European Qualifiers for 2026 FIFA World Cup, LIVE on Sony LIV.
video_info.episodeTitle: Turkiye vs Romania - Playoff Semi-finals - 26 Mar 2026
